career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'ElevenLabs $500m Series D at $11B, Cerebras $1B Series H ...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on OpenAI, Google, Claude, Gemini

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: mentions benchmarks or datasets; specific figures cited: 'adoption and a **78%', '$500m', '$11B,'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'ElevenLabs $500m Series D at $11B, Cerebras $1B Series H ...' (OpenAI, Google, Claude, Gemini) -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) covers OpenAI, Google, Claude, Gemini -- no overt promotional language, but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'ElevenLabs $500m Series D at $11B, Cerebras $1B Series H ...' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on OpenAI/Google topics -- insufficient history to assess
